PLAINTIFF OPENTABLE,INC. MOTION FOR PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION;BASED ON FINDINGS OF FACTS AND CONCLUSION OF LAW, THE COURT HEREBY ORDERS AND ADJUDGES AS FOLLOWS; 1. DEFENDANTS, THEIR OFFICERS,DIRECTORS.EMPLOYEES, AGENTS, AND ALL OTHER PARTIES ACTING IN CONCERT WITH THEM ARE HEREBY PRELIMINARILY ENJONED FROM DESTROYING ADDITIONAL SOURCE CODE AND/OR OTHER EVIDENCE RELEVANT IN THIS ACTION, HEREBY ORDERED AND DIRECTED TO DELIVER COPIES OF ALL REMAINING EVIDENCE TO COUNSEL FOR THE CORPORATE DEFENDANTS,WHO WILL BE RESPONSIBLE FOR MAINTAINING AND PRESERVING SUCH EVIDENCE. 2.ORDERED AND DIRECTED TO MAINTAIN THE CONFIDENTIALITY OF ANY OF PLAINTIFF OPEN TABLE TRADE SECRET SOURCE CODE IN THEIR POSSESSION. 3.PRELIMINARILY ENJOINED FROM DISCLOSING PLAINTIFF OPEN TABLE TRADE SECRET CODE INCLUDING WITHOUT LIMITATION, THE OCTOBER 2003 AND DECEMBER 2003 VERSIONS OF DEFENDANT SMART RESTAURANT'S SMART TOUCH SOFTWARE AND ANY OTHER VERSION THAT INCORPORATES ANY PORTION OR DERIVATIVES THEREOF.4. PRELIMINARILY ENJONED FROM DISCLOSING ANY COMPUTER SOFTWARE BASED UPON OR DERIVED FROM ANY PORTION OF PLAINTIFF OPEN TABLE'S TRADE SECRET COMPUTER SOFTWARE SOURCE CODE, INCLUDING WITHOUT LIMITATION THE RESERVATION MANAGEMENT PORTIONS OF DEFENDANT SMART RESTAURANT CURRENT VERSION OF ITS SMART TOUCH SOFTWARE. 5. THIS ORDER OF PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION IS CONDITIONED UPON OPEN TABLE POSTING AN INJUNCTION BOND IN THE AMOUNT IN THE AMOUNT OF $25,000.00 WITH THE CLERK OF THIS COURT.6.THIS ORDER OF PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION SHALL BE BINDING ON DEFENDANTS AND ANY PERSON(S) ACTING IN CONCERT WITH THEM WHO IS SERVED A COPY OF THIS ORDER OF PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION. SO ORDERED.
